errors.evidence: The trace includes a python_interpreter tool call (call id call_2) executing code to invoke the search_agent instead of directly calling the search_agent tool.
errors.description: The agent chose to embed a search_agent call inside a python_interpreter session rather than using the dedicated search_agent tool, leading to unnecessary complexity and potential execution errors.
